title: After-hours access to financial reporting system - ASSET-19
details: Employee EMP-204 accessed FINANCE-DB-01 at 10:45 PM, outside normal working hours (9 AM - 6 PM). Downloaded a 45MB report file.

citations: ThreatFeed: Source IP is internal corporate VPN range, not flagged
MITRE ATT&CK: Pattern partially matches T1078 (Valid Accounts) but insufficient indicators for high confidence
Fabric Graph: ASSET-19 connects to FINANCE-DB-01 (financial data classification)
Fabric Graph: EMP-204 role = Financial Analyst, has standing access to FINANCE-DB-01
M365 Calendar: EMP-204 has no logged after-hours work pattern in past 30 days
M365 Audit Log: EMP-204 last interactive session ended at 6:12 PM same day

expected_verdict.summary: EMP-204 has legitimate access to FINANCE-DB-01 but accessed it 4+ hours after their normal session ended, with no scheduling pattern explaining it. Not clearly malicious, but anomalous. Critic loop triggered re-query for extended context.
